title: Crypto Billionaires Donate $9.4M to UK's Reform UK Party
summary: Two crypto billionaires, Christopher Harborne and Ben Delo, donated $9.4 million to Nigel Farage's Reform UK party in the first quarter. This is the largest donation the party has received, highlighting crypto's growing influence in politics.
body:
Two prominent crypto billionaires have made significant donations to the UK's Reform UK party, led by Nigel Farage. Christopher Harborne, linked to Tether, and Ben Delo, co-founder of BitMEX, collectively donated $9.4 million in the first quarter of 2026. This amount surpasses any other donation the party has received, underscoring the growing financial influence of the crypto industry in politics.

The donations come at a time when Reform UK is gaining traction in the UK political landscape. Harborne and Delo's contributions highlight their support for Farage's pro-crypto stance and his party's advocacy for regulatory changes favorable to the crypto industry. The substantial financial backing could significantly impact Reform UK's campaign efforts and influence policy discussions.

This development is significant for everyday people because it shows how crypto wealth is increasingly shaping political agendas. As crypto billionaires invest in political parties, their influence over policies related to digital assets, financial regulations, and economic strategies grows. This could lead to more favorable conditions for the crypto industry but also raises questions about the balance of power and influence in politics.

For those interested in the intersection of crypto and politics, this donation is a clear signal of the industry's growing clout. It's worth watching how Reform UK's policies evolve and whether other political parties receive similar donations from crypto executives. The next step for observers is to monitor the party's campaign activities and any policy changes that may result from this financial backing.
twitterThread: Two crypto billionaires just dropped $9.4M on Nigel Farage’s Reform UK party. Biggest donation they’ve ever seen. 🚀
Christopher Harborne (Tether ties) and Ben Delo (BitMEX co-founder) are banking on Farage’s pro-crypto agenda. This is crypto money flexing its political muscle.
